ogTitle: Merriang vs Merriang South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Merriang and Merriang South.
heading: Merriang vs Merriang South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Merriang, Victoria and Merriang South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Merriang has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Merriang South (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Merriang or Merriang South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Merriang has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Merriang South scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Merriang scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Merriang South scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Merriang or Merriang South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Merriang has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
